channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In the Ebola epicenter, a gold-mining town reacts with fear, disbelief, and determination
item.description: NPR reports from Mongbwalu in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Efforts to contain the virus face challenges from supply shortages to residents who ...

item.title: Five years after the Surfside condo collapse, the tragedy's impact endures
item.description: Surfside, Florida, marks five years since a beachfront condominium collapsed, killing 98 people. It was one of the largest structural failures in...

item.title: Four ways to plan an ideal summer, according to a happiness expert
item.description: Gretchen Rubin, host of the Happier podcast, offers exercises to help you make the most of the season. Fill out the p...

item.title: Appeals court permits Trump administration to expand fast-track deportations
item.description: A federal appeals court on Tuesday allowed the Trump administration to resume expedited deportations of undocumented immigrants nationwide.
